overall.description: First-person truck cabin view from a driving simulator game, navigating through rainy urban streets with heavy traffic. The truck stops at a red light behind an orange delivery truck before proceeding through a busy intersection and continuing through the city.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane urban arterial road in heavy rain

agents.ego_description: driving truck on wet multi-lane road in heavy rain, navigating through scattered traffic at moderate speed

line of trees along the left sidewalk partially obscured by rain
grey concrete retaining wall running along right side of road
tall street light poles lining the road

segments.scene_description: The truck drives along a rain-soaked multi-lane urban road with moderate traffic. Trees line the left side while a concrete barrier runs along the right, with streetlights visible ahead through the heavy downpour.

events.description: approaching orange delivery truck stopped at red traffic light
coming to complete stop behind orange delivery truck
traffic light changes from red to green

agents.ego_description: slowing down and coming to a complete stop behind orange truck at red light, then waiting stationary

entered.detail: large orange box truck with illuminated brake lights stopped at intersection
traffic signal showing red light above the intersection

segments.scene_description: The truck approaches an intersection and stops behind an orange delivery truck waiting at a red light. The vehicle remains stationary for an extended period waiting for the signal to change while other cars pass through the intersection.

events.description: accelerating from stop through the intersection
executing left turn at the intersection

agents.ego_description: accelerating through green light and making a left turn at the intersection, following the orange truck initially then diverging

notable_agents.action: black sedan waiting at the intersection on the right side

entered.detail: white striped pedestrian crosswalk lines painted on the road
modern building with reflective glass curtain wall facade

segments.scene_description: As the light turns green, the truck accelerates through the intersection, crossing the marked crosswalk and executing a left turn. The orange truck continues straight and exits view, while modern glass buildings and a bus shelter come into view on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy commercial city street with tall buildings

events.description: navigating through heavy traffic with large red semi-truck alongside

agents.ego_description: driving through busy city street with dense truck traffic, maneuvering between large vehicles in rainy conditions

notable_agents.action: large red semi-truck driving alongside in the right lane
white sedan ahead with brake lights intermittently illuminated

entered.detail: large red articulated lorry with trailer driving in the right lane
tall commercial building with extensive glass facade reflecting the rainy street
commercial shop fronts with bright interior lighting visible through windows

segments.scene_description: The truck continues driving through a busy commercial district with dense traffic, including a large red semi-truck alongside and various cars ahead. Tall glass buildings with illuminated storefronts line the right side of the wet street as the rain continues to fall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a truck cabin as it navigates a rain-soaked urban road that transitions from a tree-lined thoroughfare into a dense commercial district. It begins by driving through a heavy downpour along a multi-lane road flanked by trees and a concrete barrier, moving steadily toward a distant set of streetlights. As the truck approaches an intersection, the camera comes to a halt behind an orange delivery truck, remaining stationary while other vehicles pass through the red light. The scene then shifts as the light turns green and the truck accelerates forward, executing a left turn across a marked crosswalk while the orange truck disappears from view and modern glass buildings emerge on the right. Finally, the camera glides deeper into the busy city center, passing a large red semi-truck and illuminated storefronts that reflect off the wet pavement under the persistent rain.
